chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4784 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on Misc. No. 21349/2024 3. For order on Misc. No. 21350/2024 4. For hearing of main case 17.10.2025 Ms. Saima Imdad Asstt. A.G. Sindh -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This petition was last taken up on 10.12.2024, when Ms. Rubina K. Durani advocate filed her Vakalatnama on behalf of petitioner, which was taken on record. However, in the last one year, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to proceed with this petition diligently. Today none present for the petitioner without intimation. It is noted that even on inception none was present on behalf of the petitioner. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition. It is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed/pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
